questionHtml: The experiment gave an error in the rate because the pressure gauge was inaccurate. Outline whether repeating the experiment, using the same apparatus, and averaging the results would reduce the error.
markschemeHtml:
no AND it is a systematic error/not a random error
OR
no AND «a similar magnitude» error would occur every time  [✔]
